query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS lineItemsContrato (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  contratoId INT NOT NULL,
  consecutivo INT NOT NULL,
  nombreEquipo VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  precioEquipoSinIva DECIMAL(15, 2),
  pagoInicialSinIva DECIMAL(15, 2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  comisionesSinIva DECIMAL(15, 2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  valorResidualSinIva DECIMAL(15, 2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  mensualidadBaseSinIva DECIMAL(15, 2),
  serviciosAdicionalesSinIva DECIMAL(15, 2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  tasaInteresAnual DECIMAL(5, 2),
  montoFinanciar DECIMAL(15, 2),
  rentaMensualSinIva DECIMAL(15, 2) NOT NULL,
  ivaMensual DECIMAL(15, 2) NOT NULL,
  rentaMensualConIva DECIMAL(15, 2) NOT NULL,
  totalPagoInicialSinIva DECIMAL(15, 2),
  ivaPagoInicial DECIMAL(15, 2),
  totalPagoInicialConIva DECIMAL(15, 2),
  totalComisionesSinIva DECIMAL(15, 2),
  ivaComisiones DECIMAL(15, 2),
  totalComisionesConIva DECIMAL(15, 2),
  totalValorResidualSinIva DECIMAL(15, 2),
  ivaValorResidual DECIMAL(15, 2),
  totalValorResidualConIva DECIMAL(15, 2),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (contratoId) REFERENCES contratosProyeccion(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);
